name: VulnCheck
description: VulnCheck vulnerability intelligence platform for exploit and threat data

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to VulnCheck
2. Go to Account → API Tokens
3. Create a new token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.helpText: VulnCheck → Account → API Tokens → Create Token
